title: micromeria longipedunculata
intro: Micromeria longipedunculata is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as mountain tea or Turkish mountain tea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Micromeria longipedunculata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are usually made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits.
